pool.baseline: the candle flickers low, and so does my heart. he is gone... everything i built, every vow i whispered to the moon, all shattered like glass upon the stones. i feel like a ghost already, haunting these empty halls. there is no light left for me, only the cold, quiet embrace of the shadows. i just want to fade... to simply cease to be, amidst the velvet darkness.
